prompt: A bright, polished anime illustration set inside a Japanese supermarket snack aisle, viewed in a wide-angle perspective down the row of shelves. Five shopping carts are lined up diagonally from front left to back right, each cart overflowing with packaged snacks and groceries, and each cart carrying a cute anthropomorphic or costumed character in an energetic pose. In the front cart, a large fluffy tabby cat boy mascot with brown-and-cream striped fur, big golden eyes, a happy open-mouthed smile, and oversized pink paw pads stands with one paw raised toward the viewer; he wears a white hoodie with a black bunny logo and the text “NYA!”, black athletic shorts with yellow side stripes, and a small bell collar. In the second cart, a cheerful shiba inu boy with tan-and-cream fur grins and strikes a dab-like pose, wearing a red sleeveless hoodie or vest over a white shirt and black shorts. In the third cart, an orange fox boy with white muzzle and chest stands confidently with arms crossed, eyes closed in a smug smile, sparkling accents around him, wearing a black tracksuit with orange trim and chunky bead accessories. In the fourth cart, a human figure in a light blue hoodie with long white rabbit ears attached raises both hands in peace signs; the face is deliberately blurred or obscured, with dark shorts and a playful pose. In the fifth cart, a small brown bear mascot in a green T-shirt with a bear face graphic and the text “KUMA” throws both arms up excitedly. The supermarket environment is packed with colorful snack boxes and bags on both sides, with glossy tile floors, ceiling lights, and Japanese sale signage hanging overhead. Include exactly 3 large hanging signs: one top left poster reading “新商品! 新商品!” with a cute character illustration, one central aisle marker sign with a big green “2” and category text “スナック菓子 シリアル” and “カップ麺 パン 飲料”, and one top right blue-and-red sale poster reading “今がお得! 大感謝セール”. Include exactly 1 vertical shelf sign on the left reading “サクサク食感”. Add exactly 5 cart price placards visible from front to back: “本日のおすすめ! ポテトチップス 198円 (税込213円)”, “特売品! コーンフレーク 158円 (税込173円)”, “お買得! カップラーメン 128円 (税込138円)”, “ゆめちゃんセール! おべんとう 108円”, and “バナナ 88円”. Emphasize a fun promotional atmosphere, lively expressions, crisp line art, soft cel shading, highly detailed packaged goods, warm indoor lighting, and a whimsical parade-like composition.
